caption: A person's hands hold up a dark, textured, rectangular mat in front of a background that includes stacks of trading card boxes and a computer screen. In the upper right and lower right of the scene, a small inset video shows a man wearing a purple t-shirt with a yellow logo on the chest, sitting at a table with more trading card supplies. The "JASPYS" logo and the word "CASEBREAKS" appear in red and black text in the upper right of the main view and again above the man in the inset. As the sequence progresses, the person holding the mat keeps it steady in the first three views, but in the final frame, they lift the right side of the mat, causing it to curve upward. Throughout the clip, the man in the inset remains in place, observing the activity.
